features: 【Deep Hydration & Moisture Lock for Glass Skin】This hyaluronic acid serum penetrates deep into skin layers to deliver intense hydration while forming a moisture-locking barrier for 24-hour lasting effects. It instantly relieves dryness and flakiness, leaving skin plump and radiant with that coveted glass skin serum glow.

【Anti-Aging & Firming to Reduce Fine Lines】As skin elasticity naturally declines with age, this hyaluronic acid moisturiser works alongside collagen serum properties to improve firmness from within. Visibly diminishes signs of aging like smile lines and crow's feet, revealing smoother, more lifted contours with continued use.

【Travel-Friendly & Hygienic Single-Dose Vials】Unlike bulky bottles prone to oxidation, these individually sealed anti aging serum ampoules ensure fresh, potent ingredients with every use. Compact and leak-proof, they're perfect for handbags and suitcases—no spills or breakages during travel. Simply snap open this collagen serum for face for mess-free application.

【Gentle & Non-Irritating for All Skin Types】This natural hyaluronic acids serum is free from alcohol and harsh additives,safe even for sensitive skin. The non-comedogenic texture won't clog pores or cause breakouts, working like an effective wrinkle filler serum while providing balanced hydration year-round.

【Multi-Tasking Skincare in One Step】Simplify your routine with these convenient vials! This all-in-one face serum hyaluronic acid combines hydration, brightening and anti-aging benefits. Use AM to prep skin for flawless makeup, or PM to repair daily damage—wake up to soft, luminous skin. With 30 single-use doses, enjoy a month of effortless radiance.
description: Product description Product Introduction: This hyaluronic acid serum delivers deep hydration while creating a moisture-locking barrier for 24-hour lasting effects. Formulated with 3% pure hyaluronic acid, it instantly plumps skin and creates that coveted glass skin serum glow. The collagen serum properties help improve elasticity while reducing visible fine lines and wrinkles. Hyaluronic acid Key Benefits: √Travel-friendly vials in hygienic single-dose packaging √Works as both a hyaluronic acid moisturiser and wrinkle filler serum √Contains natural hyaluronic acids serum ingredients √Lightweight face serum hyaluronic acid formula absorbs quickly √Doubles as an anti aging serum and collagen serum for face √Suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin Face serum Product Specification： Net Weight: 30Pcs Hyaluronic serum How to Use: 1.Hold the face serum hyaluronic acid vial between fingers 2.Gently press both ends to open 3.Apply contents to clean face and neck 4. Gently pat until fully absorbed 5.Use morning and night for best results 6.Follow with moisturizer or makeup as needed Warnings: For external use only Avoid contact with eyes Discontinue use if irritation occurs Keep out of reach of children Store in a cool, dry place Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
